meaning: n.[生]新型,新模式标本(指正模标本损坏后随原始描述之后选择一个标本作为模式)
examples: This invention is a neotype ethoxyline resin compounds, and it's belongs to curing agent technological field.
In this paper, a neotype pumpkin seed-milk beverage was developed by using second acidified technique and the main raw material of pumpkin seed and milk.
Conclusion The neotype health education mode can significantly improve cognitive function of schizophrenics and is conducive to rehabilitation of cognitive function.
